html:
<html lang="en"><head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=5.0, user-scalable=yes">
    <title>🎂 Birthday Bliss · Greeter.com</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Lora:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400&family=Quicksand:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Great+Vibes&family=Caveat:wght@400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        :root {
            --cream: #fff9f0;
            --candle: #f7c56e;
            --sunset: #ffb347;
            --rose: #e86f6f;
            --moss: #a3c9a8;
            --lavender: #d9c8e8;
            --warm-brown: #7a4e3a;
            --text-dark: #4a2e2a;
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif;
            background: var(--cream);
            color: var(--text-dark);
            min-height: 100vh;
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }

        /* watercolor dreamscape */
        body::before {
            content: '';
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at 10% 20%, rgba(247, 197, 110, 0.2), transparent 60%),
                radial-gradient(circle at 90% 70%, rgba(232, 111, 111, 0.15), transparent 65%),
                radial-gradient(circle at 40% 80%, rgba(163, 201, 168, 0.2), transparent 50%);
            z-index: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .page {
            position: relative;
            z-index: 5;
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 60px 24px;
            text-align: center;
        }

        /* 🎈 floating balloons & stars */
        .float-party {
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .floating-item {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: -40px;
            font-size: var(--size);
            animation: floatUp linear infinite;
            opacity: 0;
        }

        @keyframes floatUp {
            0% {
                transform: translateY(0) rotate(0deg);
                opacity: 0.1;
            }

            20% {
                opacity: 0.7;
            }

            80% {
                opacity: 0.5;
            }

            100% {
                transform: translateY(-120vh) rotate(12deg);
                opacity: 0;
            }
        }

        /* hero */
        .hero-ornament {
            font-family: 'Great Vibes', cursive;
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            color: var(--rose);
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }

        h1 {
            font-family: 'Great Vibes', cursive;
            font-size: clamp(3.8rem, 12vw, 6.2rem);
            color: var(--warm-brown);
            line-height: 1.2;
        }

        .cake-icon {
            font-size: 3rem;
            margin: 8px 0;
            filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1));
        }

        .name-sub {
            font-family: 'Lora', serif;
            font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 3vw, 1.6rem);
            font-style: italic;
            color: var(--rose);
            margin-bottom: 32px;
        }

        /* flipbook */
        .book-wrap {
            perspective: 1200px;
            width: min(340px, 90vw);
            height: min(420px, 65vw);
            max-height: 420px;
            margin: 0 auto 32px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .book {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            position: relative;
            transform-style: preserve-3d;
            transition: transform 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.23, 0.98, 0.32, 1);
        }

        .book.flipped {
            transform: rotateY(-180deg);
        }

        .book-face {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            backface-visibility: hidden;
            border-radius: 6px 20px 20px 6px;
            overflow: hidden;
            box-shadow: 0 18px 35px rgba(122, 78, 58, 0.25), 0 0 0 1px rgba(232, 111, 111, 0.2);
        }

        .book-front {
            background: linear-gradient(145deg, #ffe6c9 0%, #ffddb0 100%);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 32px;
        }

        .book-spine {
            position: absolute;
            left: 0;
            top: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            width: 24px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(232, 111, 111, 0.4), rgba(232, 111, 111, 0.1));
            border-radius: 6px 0 0 6px;
        }

        .book-title {
            font-family: 'Great Vibes', cursive;
            font-size: 2.6rem;
            color: var(--warm-brown);
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }

        .book-subtitle {
            font-family: 'Caveat', cursive;
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            color: var(--rose);
        }

        .book-icon {
            font-size: 58px;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }

        .book-hint {
            margin-top: 22px;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            background: rgba(255, 245, 220, 0.7);
            padding: 5px 12px;
            border-radius: 40px;
        }

        .book-back {
            background: #fffef7;
            transform: rotateY(180deg);
            border-radius: 20px 6px 6px 20px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 32px 28px;
        }

        .inside-message {
            font-family: 'Lora', serif;
            font-style: italic;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            line-height: 1.8;
            color: var(--text-dark);
            text-align: center;
        }

        .inside-sign {
            font-family: 'Great Vibes', cursive;
            font-size: 1.9rem;
            color: var(--rose);
            margin-top: 20px;
        }

        /* gallery strip (memories) */
        .gallery-strip {
            display: flex;
            gap: 14px;
            overflow-x: auto;
            padding: 12px 0 24px;
            max-width: 700px;
            width: 100%;
            scrollbar-width: thin;
            scrollbar-color: var(--rose) #ffe0c4;
        }

        .gallery-strip::-webkit-scrollbar {
            height: 5px;
        }

        .gallery-strip::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: #ffe0c4;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }

        .gallery-strip::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: var(--rose);
            border-radius: 10px;
        }

        .mem-thumb {
            flex: 0 0 auto;
            width: 100px;
            height: 100px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            background: var(--bg, #fff0e0);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 38px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(122, 78, 58, 0.12);
            transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
            cursor: pointer;
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 2px solid white;
        }

        .mem-thumb:hover {
            transform: scale(1.05);
            box-shadow: 0 12px 22px rgba(232, 111, 111, 0.2);
        }

        .mem-thumb img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
        }

        /* story card */
        .story-section {
            background: rgba(255, 235, 215, 0.5);
            backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
        }

        .story-card {
            max-width: 600px;
            width: 90%;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 32px;
            padding: 40px 36px;
            box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
            border: 1px solid rgba(232, 111, 111, 0.2);
        }

        .story-top {
            font-family: 'Great Vibes', cursive;
            font-size: 1.8rem;
            color: var(--rose);
            margin-bottom: 14px;
        }

        .story-body {
            font-family: 'Lora', serif;
            font-style: italic;
            font-size: 1.05rem;
            line-height: 1.9;
        }

        /* wish & candle section */
        .wish-section {
            background: linear-gradient(120deg, #fff2e0, #ffead4);
        }

        .wish-card {
            max-width: 560px;
            width: 90%;
            background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.85);
            backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
            border-radius: 48px;
            padding: 40px 32px;
            box-shadow: 0 20px 45px rgba(122, 78, 58, 0.2);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 225, 190, 0.8);
        }

        .wish-emoji {
            font-size: 68px;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }

        .wish-head {
            font-family: 'Great Vibes', cursive;
            font-size: 2.3rem;
            color: var(--warm-brown);
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }

        .wish-text {
            font-family: 'Lora', serif;
            font-style: italic;
            font-size: 1.05rem;
            line-height: 1.9;
            margin-bottom: 32px;
        }

        .btn-celebrate {
            padding: 14px 40px;
            background: var(--rose);
            border: none;
            color: white;
            font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif;
            font-weight: 700;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            font-size: 1rem;
            border-radius: 60px;
            cursor: pointer;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(232, 111, 111, 0.5);
            transition: all 0.25s;
        }

        .btn-celebrate:hover {
            transform: translateY(-3px);
            background: #d45a5a;
            box-shadow: 0 14px 28px rgba(232, 111, 111, 0.6);
        }

        /* mini surprise modal */
        .surprise-toast {
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 30px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%) scale(0.9);
            background: #fff3e6;
            color: var(--warm-brown);
            padding: 12px 28px;
            border-radius: 60px;
            font-family: 'Caveat', cursive;
            font-size: 1.3rem;
            font-weight: bold;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            z-index: 200;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
            pointer-events: none;
            white-space: nowrap;
            border-left: 6px solid var(--rose);
        }

        .surprise-toast.show {
            opacity: 1;
            transform: translateX(-50%) scale(1);
        }

        @media (max-width: 550px) {
            .surprise-toast {
                font-size: 1rem;
                white-space: normal;
                width: 80%;
                text-align: center;
            }

            .book-wrap {
                margin-bottom: 20px;
            }
        }
    </style>
<style id="greeter-padding-style">body { padding-bottom: 0px !important; transition: padding 0.3s; }</style><style>
            :root {
              --bg-primary: #f9f7ff !important;
              --bg-secondary: #ffffff !important;
              --text-primary: #1a1025 !important;
              --text-secondary: #4a3b66 !important;
              --accent-gradient: linear-gradient(145deg, #7b5df6 0%, #ff7a2f 100%) !important;
              --accent-solid: #7b5df6 !important;
              --card-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.75) !important;
              --card-border: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) !important;
              --navbar-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6) !important;
              --shadow-sm: 0 8px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04) !important;
              --shadow-lg: 0 25px 40px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12) !important;
              --glow: rgba(123, 93, 246, 0.15) !important;
              --mode-transition: background 0.3s ease, color 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s !important;
              --resizer-bg: #e0d9f0 !important;
              --sidebar-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5) !important;
              --toggle-bg: #f0eaff !important;
              --panel-bg: #f5f0ff !important;
              --switch-bg: #d4c5f0 !important;
              --circle-bg: #7b5df6 !important;
            }
          </style><style>

  /* Universal Mobile Optimization */
  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    html, body { overflow-x: hidden !important; width: 100vw !important; position: relative !important; margin: 0 !important; padding: 0 !important; }
    section, .page, .content, .section { padding: 40px 16px !important; min-height: auto !important; height: auto !important; }
    .glass-card, .story-card, .card, .book-wrap, .story-section, .wish-section { width: 100% !important; max-width: 100% !important; margin: 15px 0 !important; border-radius: 28px !important; padding: 24px 16px !important; box-sizing: border-box !important; }
    h1 { font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 10vw, 3.5rem) !important; line-height: 1.1 !important; }
    h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 8vw, 2.8rem) !important; }
    .hero-title { font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 9vw, 3.2rem) !important; }
    .gallery-grid, .gallery, .gallery-strip { gap: 12px !important; padding: 10px 0 !important; }
    .btn, .greeter-cta-btn { width: 100% !important; padding: 16px 20px !important; font-size: 1.1rem !important; }
    img, video, iframe, canvas { max-width: 100% !important; height: auto !important; }
  }

</style></head>

<body contenteditable="false"><div>
<script>
(function(){
  const config = {"activeFeatures":[["curtainReveal",true]],"customData":[["curtainReveal",{"text":"","images":[],"emoji":"","audio":""}]],"userName":"Raman"};
  const magicRaw = "";
  window._magicConfig = config;
  const activeFeatureStates = new Map(config.activeFeatures);
  const customData = new Map(config.customData);
  const userName = config.userName;
  
  window.escapeHtml = function(str) { return (str||"").replace(/[&<>]/g, m => ({ '&': '&', '<': '<', '>': '>' }[m] || m)); };
  window.getUserName = () => userName;
  window.insertSectionBeforeFinal = function(doc, sectionElement) {
    const container = doc.getElementById('sections-container') || doc.body;
    const finalMessage = doc.getElementById('magic-final-surprise-section');
    const cta = doc.getElementById('magic-cta-section');
    const anchor = finalMessage || cta;
    if (anchor && anchor.parentNode === container) { container.insertBefore(sectionElement, anchor); } else { container.appendChild(sectionElement); }
  };
  window.applyFeature = function(id, active, name, text, images, emoji, audio) {
    if (!window.FEATURE_MAP || !window.FEATURE_MAP[id]) return;
    const feature = window.FEATURE_MAP[id];
    if (active && feature.enable) {
      try { 
        if (["flowerRain", "heartsOnScroll", "flyingSwans", "balloonParty"].includes(id)) {
          feature.enable(document, window, emoji);
        } else if (["scratchReveal", "giftBoxOpen", "memoryTimeline", "hugSkyLetter", "floatingPolaroids", "imageExplosion", "addImages"].includes(id)) {
          feature.enable(document, window, name, text, images);
        } else if (id === "magicMusic") {
          feature.enable(document, window, name, text, audio);
        } else {
          feature.enable(document, window, name, text);
        }
      } catch(e) { console.error("Error enabling " + id, e); }
    }
  };
  window.refreshAll = function() {
    const lockActive = activeFeatureStates.get('lock');
    if (lockActive) {
      const data = customData.get('lock') || {};
      window.applyFeature('lock', true, userName, data.text || "", data.images || [], data.emoji || "", data.audio || "");

      const handler = () => {
        window.removeEventListener('lockUnlocked', handler);
        // Respect toggle order for other features
        for (const [id, active] of activeFeatureStates.entries()) {
          if (id !== 'lock' && active) {
            const data = customData.get(id) || {};
            window.applyFeature(id, true, userName, data.text || "", data.images || [], data.emoji || "", data.audio || "");
          }
        }
      };
      window.addEventListener('lockUnlocked', handler);
    } else {
      // Respect toggle order by iterating over the Map
      for (const [id, active] of activeFeatureStates.entries()) {
        if (active) {
          const data = customData.get(id) || {};
          window.applyFeature(id, true, userName, data.text || "", data.images || [], data.emoji || "", data.audio || "");
        }
      }
    }
  };
  function initMagic() {
    if (magicRaw) {
      try {
        const decoded = atob(magicRaw);
        window.FEATURE_MAP = new Function('return ' + decoded)();
        window._magicReady = true;
        window.refreshAll();
      } catch(e) { console.error("Magic init failed", e); }
    }
  }
  if (document.readyState === 'loading') { document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initMagic); } else { initMagic(); }
})();
</script>
</div><script>(function(){ if ("scrollRestoration" in history) { history.scrollRestoration = "manual"; } window.addEventListener("load",function(){ setTimeout(function(){ window.scrollTo(0,0); document.documentElement.scrollTop=0; document.body.scrollTop=0; }, 10); }); })();</script><script>(function(){var lang="en";localStorage.setItem("greeter_lang",lang);localStorage.setItem("customizer_lang",lang);var urlParams=new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);if(!urlParams.has("lang")){var newUrl=window.location.href+(window.location.href.indexOf("?")===-1?"?lang="+lang:"&lang="+lang);window.history.replaceState({},"",newUrl);}})();</script>

    <div class="float-party" id="floatParty"><div class="floating-item" style="--size: 31.09880240839344px; left: 53.4927vw; animation-duration: 13.049s; animation-delay: 0s;">✨</div><div class="floating-item" style="--size: 43.51214003417226px; left: 50.1354vw; animation-duration: 13.4336s; animation-delay: 0s;">🌟</div><div class="floating-item" style="--size: 18.933348105024518px; left: 0.398951vw; animation-duration: 12.6089s; animation-delay: 0s;">🎉</div><div class="floating-item" style="--size: 44.96478203506902px; left: 25.8457vw; animation-duration: 11.8918s; animation-delay: 0s;">🌟</div><div class="floating-item" style="--size: 19.38496855005973px; left: 17.582vw; animation-duration: 8.18981s; animation-delay: 0s;">🎉</div><div class="floating-item" style="--size: 23.251516188554866px; left: 60.8398vw; animation-duration: 15.6168s; animation-delay: 0s;">✨</div><div class="floating-item" style="--size: 20.406623016951084px; left: 15.5125vw; animation-duration: 12.7114s; animation-delay: 0s;">🎈</div></div>
    <div class="surprise-toast" id="toastMsg">🎉 Happy Birthday! 🎂</div>

    <!-- hero section -->
    <div class="page">
        <div class="hero-ornament">✨ another beautiful year ✨</div>
        <h1 id="heroTitle">Happy Birthday, Raman</h1>
        <div class="cake-icon">🎂🎈</div>
        <div class="name-sub" id="nameSub">Raman, today is all about you ✨</div>

        <!-- flipbook -->
        <div class="book-wrap">
            <div class="book" id="book">
                <div class="book-face book-front">
                    <div class="book-spine"></div>
                    <div class="book-icon">🎁🎂</div>
                    <div class="book-title" id="bookTitle">Birthday Wishes,<br>Raman</div>
                    <div class="book-subtitle">open for a sweet surprise</div>
                    <div class="book-hint">✨ tap to open ✨</div>
                </div>
                <div class="book-face book-back">
                    <div class="inside-message" id="insideMsg">Your birthday is the day the world received a little more magic. You bring laughter, kindness, and unforgettable memories. Here's to anot...</div>
                    <div class="inside-sign" id="insideSign">Forever yours ♡</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- memory gallery strip -->
        <div class="gallery-strip" id="gallery">
            <!-- default emoji memories will be replaced dynamically -->
            <div class="mem-thumb" style="--bg:#ffd9b5">🎂</div>
            <div class="mem-thumb" style="--bg:#fbc8b5">🎈</div>
            <div class="mem-thumb" style="--bg:#ffe0b5">🎁</div>
            <div class="mem-thumb" style="--bg:#d9f0ec">🌟</div>
            <div class="mem-thumb" style="--bg:#f5d0e8">💖</div>
            <div class="mem-thumb" style="--bg:#c9e4de">📸</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- story section (personal birthday story) -->
    <div class="page story-section">
        <div class="story-card">
            <div class="story-top">💫 Our Favorite Chapter 💫</div>
            <div class="story-body" id="storyBody">Your birthday is the day the world received a little more magic. You bring laughter, kindness, and unforgettable memories. Here's to another year of adventures together.</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- wish + celebration section -->
    <div class="page wish-section">
        <div class="wish-card">
            <div class="wish-emoji">🕯️✨</div>
            <div class="wish-head" id="wishHead">Make a Wish</div>
            <div class="wish-text" id="wishText">May your heart be full, your smile never fade, and every candle brings joy. You deserve the universe.</div>
            <button class="btn-celebrate" id="celBtn">🎉 Light the Candles 🕯️</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Container for dynamic sections -->
    <div id="sections-container"></div>

    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/canvas-confetti@1"></script>
    <script>
        (function () {
            // ---------- language & userData ----------
            function getLang() {
                try {
                    const urlParam = new URLSearchParams(location.search).get('lang');
                    if (urlParam === 'hi' || urlParam === 'en') return urlParam;
                    return localStorage.getItem('greeter_lang') || 'en';
                } catch { return 'en'; }
            }

            const translations = {
                en: {
                    heroTitle: 'Happy Birthday',
                    nameSubTemplate: '{name}, today is all about you ✨',
                    bookTitle: 'Birthday Wishes,\n{name}',
                    insideMsg: 'You are a beautiful soul, and each moment with you is a gift. May your birthday sparkle with love and laughter.',
                    insideSign: 'Forever yours ♡',
                    storyTop: '💫 Our Favorite Chapter 💫',
                    storyBody: 'Your birthday is the day the world received a little more magic. You bring laughter, kindness, and unforgettable memories. Here\'s to another year of adventures together.',
                    wishHead: 'Make a Wish',
                    wishText: 'May your heart be full, your smile never fade, and every candle brings joy. You deserve the universe.',
                    celebrateBtn: '🎉 Light the Candles 🕯️',
                    toastMessage: '🎂 Happy Birthday! May all your wishes come true 🎈'
                },
                hi: {
                    heroTitle: 'जन्मदिन मुबारक हो',
                    nameSubTemplate: '{name}, आज का दिन सिर्फ तुम्हारे लिए है ✨',
                    bookTitle: 'जन्मदिन की शुभकामनाएं,\n{name}',
                    insideMsg: 'तुम एक खूबसूरत रूह हो, और तुम्हारे साथ हर पल एक उपहार है। तुम्हारा जन्मदिन प्यार और हंसी से भरा हो।',
                    insideSign: 'हमेशा तुम्हारा ♡',
                    storyTop: '💫 हमारा प्यारा अध्याय 💫',
                    storyBody: 'तुम्हारा जन्मदिन वह दिन है जब दुनिया को थोड़ा और जादू मिला। तुम हंसी, दया और अविस्मरणीय यादें लाते हो। एक और साल साथ बिताने के लिए शुभकामनाएं।',
                    wishHead: 'इच्छा करो',
                    wishText: 'तुम्हारा दिल हमेशा भरा रहे, तुम्हारी मुस्कान कभी न छीने, और हर मोमबत्ती खुशियाँ लाए। तुम ब्रह्मांड के हकदार हो।',
                    celebrateBtn: '🎉 मोमबत्तियाँ जलाएं 🕯️',
                    toastMessage: '🎂 जन्मदिन मुबारक! तुम्हारी सभी इच्छाएँ पूरी हों 🎈'
                }
            };

            let lang = getLang();
            let t = translations[lang];
            const userData = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('userData') || '{}');
            const userName = userData.name || (lang === 'hi' ? 'मेरे प्यार' : 'My Sunshine');
            const userStory = userData.story || t.storyBody;
            const userWish = userData.wishes || t.wishText;
            const userMemories = userData.memories || [];

            // DOM elements
            const heroTitleEl = document.getElementById('heroTitle');
            const nameSubEl = document.getElementById('nameSub');
            const bookTitleEl = document.getElementById('bookTitle');
            const insideMsgEl = document.getElementById('insideMsg');
            const insideSignEl = document.getElementById('insideSign');
            const storyTopEl = document.querySelector('.story-top');
            const storyBodyEl = document.getElementById('storyBody');
            const wishHeadEl = document.getElementById('wishHead');
            const wishTextEl = document.getElementById('wishText');
            const celBtn = document.getElementById('celBtn');
            const toastMsgDiv = document.getElementById('toastMsg');

            function applyLanguageAndData() {
                t = translations[lang];
                // hero
                heroTitleEl.innerText = t.heroTitle + ', ' + userName;
                nameSubEl.innerText = t.nameSubTemplate.replace('{name}', userName);
                // book
                bookTitleEl.innerText = t.bookTitle.replace('{name}', userName);
                insideMsgEl.innerText = userStory.length > 40 ? userStory.substring(0, 140) : userStory;
                insideSignEl.innerText = t.insideSign;
                // story section
                storyTopEl.innerText = t.storyTop;
                storyBodyEl.innerText = userStory;
                // wish section
                wishHeadEl.innerText = t.wishHead;
                wishTextEl.innerText = userWish;
                celBtn.innerText = t.celebrateBtn;
            }

            // populate gallery from user memories or fallback
            function loadGallery() {
                const galleryContainer = document.getElementById('gallery');
                if (!galleryContainer) return;
                if (userMemories && userMemories.length > 0) {
                    galleryContainer.innerHTML = '';
                    userMemories.forEach(mem => {
                        const thumb = document.createElement('div');
                        thumb.className = 'mem-thumb';
                        if (mem.img && mem.img.trim() !== '') {
                            thumb.innerHTML = `<img src="${mem.img}" alt="memory">`;
                        } else {
                            thumb.innerText = mem.text || '🎈';
                        }
                        galleryContainer.appendChild(thumb);
                    });
                } else {
                    // default fallback with birthday emojis (keep default but ensure they show)
                    if (galleryContainer.children.length === 0 || galleryContainer.children.length < 4) {
                        const defaultMems = ['🎂', '🎈', '🎁', '🌟', '💖', '📸'];
                        galleryContainer.innerHTML = '';
                        defaultMems.forEach(icon => {
                            const div = document.createElement('div');
                            div.className = 'mem-thumb';
                            div.style.setProperty('--bg', '#ffe0c4');
                            div.innerText = icon;
                            galleryContainer.appendChild(div);
                        });
                    }
                }
            }

            // ---------- floating balloons & stars (birthday vibe) ----------
            const floatContainer = document.getElementById('floatParty');
            const partyItems = ['🎈', '🎂', '✨', '🌟', '🎉', '💝', '🎁'];
            function spawnFloater() {
                const el = document.createElement('div');
                el.className = 'floating-item';
                const size = 18 + Math.random() * 28;
                el.style.setProperty('--size', size + 'px');
                el.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + 'vw';
                el.style.animationDuration = 7 + Math.random() * 9 + 's';
                el.style.animationDelay = '0s';
                el.innerText = partyItems[Math.floor(Math.random() * partyItems.length)];
                floatContainer.appendChild(el);
                setTimeout(() => el.remove(), 12000);
            }
            setInterval(spawnFloater, 1400);

            // book flip
            const bookDiv = document.getElementById('book');
            if (bookDiv) {
                bookDiv.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    bookDiv.classList.toggle('flipped');
                });
            }

            // confetti celebration + toast message
            function triggerCelebration() {
                // show toast
                toastMsgDiv.innerText = t.toastMessage;
                toastMsgDiv.classList.add('show');
                setTimeout(() => toastMsgDiv.classList.remove('show'), 2800);
                // confetti burst
                const colors = ['#ffb347', '#e86f6f', '#f7c56e', '#a3c9a8', '#ff9f7c'];
                for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        canvasConfetti({ particleCount: 120, spread: 80, origin: { y: 0.6, x: 0.2 + i * 0.3 }, colors, angle: 70, startVelocity: 18 });
                        canvasConfetti({ particleCount: 80, spread: 55, origin: { y: 0.5, x: 0.8 - i * 0.1 }, colors, angle: 110, startVelocity: 20 });
                    }, i * 220);
                }
                canvasConfetti({ particleCount: 200, spread: 100, origin: { y: 0.4 }, colors, startVelocity: 15, ticks: 180 });
                // extra random pops
                setTimeout(() => {
                    canvasConfetti({ particleCount: 300, spread: 120, origin: { y: 0.7 }, colors: ['#ffb347', '#e86f6f'], startVelocity: 12 });
                }, 400);
            }

            if (celBtn) {
                celBtn.addEventListener('click', triggerCelebration);
            }

            // watch for language changes (storage or focus)
            function refreshLanguage() {
                const newLang = getLang();
                if (newLang !== lang) {
                    lang = newLang;
                    
                    // also refresh wish text if custom wish exists, story exists
                    const freshUserData = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('userData') || '{}');
                    if (freshUserData.story) storyBodyEl.innerText = freshUserData.story;
                    if (freshUserData.wishes) wishTextEl.innerText = freshUserData.wishes;
                    if (freshUserData.name) {
                        heroTitleEl.innerText = translations[lang].heroTitle + ', ' + freshUserData.name;
                        nameSubEl.innerText = translations[lang].nameSubTemplate.replace('{name}', freshUserData.name);
                        bookTitleEl.innerText = translations[lang].bookTitle.replace('{name}', freshUserData.name);
                    }
                    insideMsgEl.innerText = (freshUserData.story || translations[lang].insideMsg).substring(0, 140);
                    toastMsgDiv.innerText = translations[lang].toastMessage;
                }
            }

            window.addEventListener('storage', (e) => {
                if (e.key === 'greeter_lang' || e.key === 'customizer_lang' || e.key === 'userData') {
                    refreshLanguage();
                    // reload gallery if memories changed
                    const updated = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('userData') || '{}');
                    if (updated.memories) {
                        const gal = document.getElementById('gallery');
                        if (gal) {
                            if (updated.memories.length > 0) {
                                gal.innerHTML = '';
                                updated.memories.forEach(mem => {
                                    const div = document.createElement('div');
                                    div.className = 'mem-thumb';
                                    if (mem.img) div.innerHTML = `<img src="${mem.img}" alt="memory">`;
                                    else div.innerText = mem.text || '♡';
                                    gal.appendChild(div);
                                });
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            });

            window.addEventListener('focus', () => {
                const newLangCheck = getLang();
                if (newLangCheck !== lang) {
                    lang = newLangCheck;
                    
                    const fresh = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('userData') || '{}');
                    if (fresh.story) storyBodyEl.innerText = fresh.story;
                    if (fresh.wishes) wishTextEl.innerText = fresh.wishes;
                    if (fresh.memories && fresh.memories.length) {
                        const gal = document.getElementById('gallery');
                        if (gal) {
                            gal.innerHTML = '';
                            fresh.memories.forEach(mem => {
                                const div = document.createElement('div');
                                div.className = 'mem-thumb';
                                if (mem.img) div.innerHTML = `<img src="${mem.img}" alt="memory">`;
                                else div.innerText = mem.text || '🎈';
                                gal.appendChild(div);
                            });
                        }
                    }
                }
            });

            // initial load of gallery and texts
            loadGallery();
            
            // override story/wish from userData if present (since apply uses default story from translations but we want custom)
            if (userStory && storyBodyEl) storyBodyEl.innerText = userStory;
            if (userWish && wishTextEl) wishTextEl.innerText = userWish;
            if (insideMsgEl && userStory) insideMsgEl.innerText = userStory.length > 140 ? userStory.substring(0, 137) + '...' : userStory;

            // small extra: update inside sign from userData custom note? not required but nice.
            if (userData.customNote) {
                insideSignEl.innerText = userData.customNote;
            }
        })();
    </script>


<div id="magic-cta-section">
<style>
.greeter-cta-section { margin: 60px auto 40px; padding: 40px 30px; max-width: 600px; text-align: center; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4); border-radius: 28px; box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); color: inherit; font-family: 'Inter', 'Quicksand', sans-serif; position: relative; z-index: 100; }
.greeter-cta-title { font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 12px; color: inherit; line-height: 1.3; }
.greeter-cta-desc { font-size: 1.1rem; margin-bottom: 28px; opacity: 0.9; line-height: 1.6; color: inherit; }
.greeter-cta-btn { display: inline-block; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff2a5f, #ff4b2b); color: #ffffff !important; text-decoration: none; padding: 18px 36px; font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 700; border-radius: 50px; box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(255, 42, 95, 0.4); transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275), box-shadow 0.3s; border: none; cursor: pointer; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; }
.greeter-cta-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-4px) scale(1.02); box-shadow: 0 14px 32px rgba(255, 42, 95, 0.6); }
.greeter-logo-accent { font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 16px; filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)); }
@media (max-width: 600px) { .greeter-cta-section { margin: 40px 20px; padding: 30px 20px; } .greeter-cta-title { font-size: 1.5rem; } .greeter-cta-btn { padding: 15px 24px; font-size: 1rem; } }
</style>
<div class="greeter-cta-section">
    <div class="greeter-logo-accent">✨🪄</div>
    <h2 class="greeter-cta-title" data-en="Create Your Own Magical Surprise" data-hi="अपना जादुई सरप्राइज़ बनाएं">Create Your Own Magical Surprise</h2>
    <p class="greeter-cta-desc" data-en="Surprise your loved ones with a personalized website just like this one. No coding required!" data-hi="बिल्कुल इसी तरह की वेबसाइट से अपने प्रियजनों को सरप्राइज़ दें। कोई कोडिंग जरूरी नहीं!">Surprise your loved ones with a personalized website just like this one. No coding required!</p>
    <a href="/index.html" target="_blank" class="greeter-cta-btn" data-en="Press this red button to create your own website in minutes" data-hi="मिनटों में अपनी वेबसाइट बनाने के लिए यह लाल बटन दबाएं">Press this red button to create your own website in minutes</a>
</div>
 <script>
(function(){
  var lang = localStorage.getItem("greeter_lang") || "en";
  var section = document.querySelector(".greeter-cta-section");
  if(section) {
    var title = section.querySelector(".greeter-cta-title");
    var desc = section.querySelector(".greeter-cta-desc");
    var btn = section.querySelector(".greeter-cta-btn");
    if(lang === "hi") {
      title.innerText = title.getAttribute("data-hi");
      desc.innerText = desc.getAttribute("data-hi");
      btn.innerText = btn.getAttribute("data-hi");
    }
  }
})();
</script>
</div></body></html>
